concerns.text: Task T019 implements 'fractal dimension calculation' to address a reviewer's comment, but FR-003 explicitly lists only branch points, total length, soma area, and Sholl intersections. This adds unapproved scope (gold-plating) and contradicts the explicit metric list in the spec. The task note admits it is 'not part of the primary regression model' but still implements it, violating the constraint to strictly adhere to FR-003.

Task T019 introduces a 'box-counting method' for fractal dimension which is not part of the mandated plugin set (Simple Neurite Tracer or Microglial Morphometry) defined in Constitution Principle VI (Neuro-Image Quantification Rigor). This violates the constitutional requirement for standardized pipeline derivation.

Task T035 calculates 'absolute percentage deviation' of p-values for sensitivity analysis. SC-003 requires verifying that the 'variation in the primary interaction effect p-value' ensures stability. Percentage deviation of a p-value (which can be near zero) is mathematically unstable and not the standard metric for stability (which should be absolute difference or log-transformed ratio), making the success criterion untestable as defined in the spec.

Tasks T006a and T006b define schema paths as `specs/001-investigating-the-role-of-microglial-mor/contracts/`, but plan.md Project Structure defines the path as `specs/001-gene-regulation/contracts/`. This path mismatch violates the plan's structural constraints and will cause dependency tasks (T007, T018) to fail or write to the wrong location.

Tasks T012a, T012b, and T018 rely on 'synthetic data' for validation, but FR-001 and FR-008 require the system to ingest and validate 'high-resolution confocal microscopy images from the Allen Brain Atlas and AD Knowledge Portal'. The current task list has no mechanism to actually fetch, checksum, or process real external datasets, leaving the core data ingestion requirement unimplemented. The plan acknowledges this as a blocking dependency, but the tasks do not reflect the required logic for real data ingestion (only synthetic).
